<|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> And thus we praise you in advance for all that you are doing and will do to sustain us for the sake of your love.<|10.02|> <|10.92|> Amen.<|11.60|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> Amen.<|5.00|><|endoftext|>
